note: OPTIONAL Ute Conference baseline seed source: defines EMPTY team shells (no rosters) per season + age division + team code. Districts now live in the DEFAULT seeded district registry (src/data/districtRegistrySeed.ts), so this seed only adds team shells over the full registry and is no longer required for basic roster import (which creates teams). NO player/coach data lives here. Team codes are the classification codes the parser supports (A1..A4, B1..B4, C1, C2, D2). Expand by adding seasons or per-age-division code lists.
